name: claude-otel-plugin
description: Export Claude Code sessions as OpenTelemetry traces

CLAUDE_OTEL_ENABLED.title: Enable tracing
CLAUDE_OTEL_ENABLED.description: Enable Claude Code OTLP trace export.

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT.title: OTLP endpoint
OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_ENDPOINT.description: Base OTLP HTTP endpoint. The trace path is appended unless a traces URL is configured.

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT.title: OTLP traces endpoint
OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT.description: Full OTLP HTTP traces endpoint. Overrides endpoint + trace path.

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_ENDPOINT.title: OTLP metrics endpoint
OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_METRICS_ENDPOINT.description: Full OTLP HTTP metrics endpoint. Overrides endpoint + metrics path.

OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS.title: OTLP headers
OTEL_EXPORTER_OTLP_HEADERS.description: Headers as KEY=VALUE pairs or a JSON object.

CLAUDE_OTEL_TRACE_PATH.title: Trace path
CLAUDE_OTEL_TRACE_PATH.description: Path appended to the endpoint when no full traces endpoint is set.

CLAUDE_OTEL_METRICS_PATH.title: Metrics path
CLAUDE_OTEL_METRICS_PATH.description: Path appended to the endpoint when no full metrics endpoint is set.

CLAUDE_OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES.title: Resource attributes
CLAUDE_OTEL_RESOURCE_ATTRIBUTES.description: JSON object or comma-separated KEY=VALUE resource attributes.

CLAUDE_OTEL_MAX_CHARS.title: Max captured characters
CLAUDE_OTEL_MAX_CHARS.description: Truncate captured inputs and outputs to this many characters.

CLAUDE_OTEL_TIMEOUT_MS.title: OTLP timeout
CLAUDE_OTEL_TIMEOUT_MS.description: OTLP HTTP request timeout in milliseconds.

CLAUDE_OTEL_USER_ID.title: User ID
CLAUDE_OTEL_USER_ID.description: Optional user identifier attached to exported traces and metrics.
